selected_items.title: BMW launches vehicle configurator as a dialogue-based plugin in OpenAI’s ChatGPT. Fri Jul 17 10:00:00 CEST 2026 Press Release The new BMW plugin in ChatGPT for the first time enables AI-assisted, dialogue-based configuration of current BMW models. Custom vehicle configuration via text or voice input on smartphones and desktop computers. The development sees BMW add a new digital channel through which people can engage with the brand. Innovation · Corporate
